name: swift-skills
description: Swift, SwiftUI, and iOS development skills for Claude Code.

plugins.name: swift-skills
plugins.description: Six skills for Swift/iOS development: Foundation Models (complete guide with API reference, anti-patterns, and diagnostics), SwiftData persistence, iOS 26 SwiftUI/Liquid Glass reference, accessibility diagnostics, Swizzle CLI integration, and structured logging patterns. Includes hooks for Swift pattern enforcement and skill discovery.
